name: adapters
description: E2E test site for testing official adapters
author: LekoArts

scripts.build:debug: cross-env USE_DEBUG_ADAPTER=y CYPRESS_SUPPORT=y npm run build
scripts.develop:debug: start-server-and-test develop http://localhost:8000 'npm run cy:open -- --config baseUrl=http://localhost:8000'
scripts.test:template: cross-env-shell CYPRESS_GROUP_NAME="adapter:$ADAPTER / trailingSlash:${TRAILING_SLASH:-always} / pathPrefix:${PATH_PREFIX:--}" TRAILING_SLASH=$TRAILING_SLASH PATH_PREFIX=$PATH_PREFIX node ../../scripts/cypress-run-with-conditional-record-flag.js --browser chrome --e2e --config-file "cypress/configs/$ADAPTER.ts" --env TRAILING_SLASH=$TRAILING_SLASH,PATH_PREFIX=$PATH_PREFIX
scripts.test:template:debug: cross-env-shell CYPRESS_GROUP_NAME="adapter:$ADAPTER / trailingSlash:${TRAILING_SLASH:-always} / pathPrefix:${PATH_PREFIX:--}" TRAILING_SLASH=$TRAILING_SLASH PATH_PREFIX=$PATH_PREFIX npm run cy:open -- --config-file "cypress/configs/$ADAPTER.ts" --env TRAILING_SLASH=$TRAILING_SLASH,PATH_PREFIX=$PATH_PREFIX
scripts.test:netlify:prefix-never: cross-env TRAILING_SLASH=never PATH_PREFIX=/prefix node scripts/deploy-and-run/netlify.mjs test:template
scripts.test:netlify:prefix-never:debug: cross-env TRAILING_SLASH=never PATH_PREFIX=/prefix node scripts/deploy-and-run/netlify.mjs test:template:debug
